blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
